name: COCHING AI — 제품 수집 v1 Gemini+Claude

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO product_master
  (brand_name, product_name, product_name_local, category,
   full_ingredients, key_ingredients, product_type, target_skin_type,
   ph_range, viscosity_type, country_of_origin, retail_price_usd,
   volume_ml, image_url, brand_website, notable_claims, launch_year,
   source, collected_at)
SELECT $1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6::jsonb, $7, $8, $9, $10, $11,
       $12::numeric, $13, $14, $15, $16, $17::integer, $18, $19::timestamp
WHERE length($1) > 0 AND length($2) > 0
ON CONFLICT (brand_name, product_name)
DO UPDATE SET
  full_ingredients = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.full_ingredients, ''), product_master.full_ingredients),
  key_ingredients = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.key_ingredients, product_master.key_ingredients),
  image_url = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.image_url, ''), product_master.image_url),
  ph_range = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.ph_range, ''), product_master.ph_range),
  updated_at = NOW()
SELECT id,brand_name,product_name,full_ingredients FROM product_master WHERE ph_value IS NULL OR viscosity_cp IS NULL ORDER BY id LIMIT 5
SELECT brand_name, product_name FROM product_master ORDER BY id

INSERT INTO cosmetics_company
  (company_name, business_type, representative, address, registration_date, country_of_origin, source, collected_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.company_name }}',
  '{{ $json.business_type }}',
  '{{ $json.representative }}',
  '{{ $json.address }}',
  '{{ $json.registration_date }}',
  'korea',
  'mfds_korea',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (company_name)
DO UPDATE SET
  business_type = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.business_type, ''), cosmetics_company.business_type),
  representative = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.representative, ''), cosmetics_company.representative),
  address = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.address, ''), cosmetics_company.address),
  updated_at = NOW()
